package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for http_body_readall_without_limitreader: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `io.ReadAll(req.Body)` in HTTP handlers without `io.LimitReader`
type CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderModel
}

type CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreader(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpBodyReadallWithoutLimitreaderDTO) error {
    focus := "http_body_readall_without_limitreader"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    reusable := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = reusable
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    http_body_readall_limitreader_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "body": 2, "readall": 3, "limitreader": 4}
    http_body_readall_limitreader_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_body_readall_limitreader_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    body_negative_1 := http_body_readall_limitreader_negative["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_negative_1
    readall_negative_2 := http_body_readall_limitreader_negative["readall"] + len(input)
    _ = readall_negative_2
    limitreader_negative_3 := http_body_readall_limitreader_negative["limitreader"] + len(input)
    _ = limitreader_negative_3
    return nil
}
